text:
From: clkao@CirX.ORG
 Date: Thu, 10 Sep 1998 20:04:43 GMT
 Title: ports/7882: Emacs with leim package
 Message-ID: <199809102004.UAA28312@CirX.ORG>

Hello and nice to meet you!

> this patch to the emacs20 port add an optional variable WITH_LEIM
> which includes the leim package if enabled.

This style needs more disk space for package distribution on the ftp sites.
Then, I made the LEIM *only* ports. And now I am testing it.
I will send-pr my LEIM *only* ports the next day.

I would like you to approve of this plan.

Thank you.
--- shige
